free_text: Evaluated (alpha,n) reaction data on most important
nuclei entered in composition of chemical reagents
which used in nuclear fuel work process.
The estimation procedure includes two basic stages:
compilation of experimental data on the reaction cross
sections and the establishment of recommended values of
the experimental quantities and their indeterminacies
on the basis of the sampled data, using statistical
